arts.ttl: Juventus Eye Zirkzee as Napoli and Atalanta Compete for Raspadori
Giorgio Scalvini’s returns to Atalanta squad for Parma match
arts.sum: In a significant development for Atalanta, young defender Giorgio Scalvini has been included in the squad for the upcoming match against Parma, marking his return after a lengthy recovery from a serious knee injury. This comeback comes just over 170 days since he suffered a torn anterior cruciate ligament during a match against Fiorentina on June 2, 2024. Scalvini’s recovery is notable not only for its speed but also for its potential impact on Atalanta’s defensive lineup as they continue their campaign in Serie A. arts.ttl: Serie A | Parma v Atalanta: Match Preview
arts.sum: Serie A’s surprise title contenders Atalanta travel to face newly-promoted Parma on Saturday, looking to extend their impressive winning streak and keep pace at the top of the table. The Bergamo-based club have been in scintillating form, winning their last six league matches to surge into second place, just one point off the summit. Gian Piero Gasperini’s men have been simply irresistible in recent weeks, sweeping aside all before them with a potent mix of attacking flair and defensive solidity. Their 2-1 victory over Udinese before the international break was their sixth consecutive Serie A win, moving them to within The post Serie A | Parma v Atalanta: Match Preview appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Fabio Pecchia: “My dream is to transform Parma into a source of pride for the city”
arts.sum: Parma head coach Fabio Pecchia says he wants to transform the club into a “source of pride for the city”. Pecchia is often referred to as the “lawyer” due to his law degree, but as Gazzetta dello Sport suggest, a more fitting description would be “elementary school teacher.” This analogy stems from his approach to coaching, treating his young squad with the same spirit and method as an instructor guiding an inexperienced class hanging on his every word. Parma, the youngest team in Serie A, has already shown promising signs under Pecchia’s tutelage. arts.ttl: Arsenal or Man Utd? Ademola Lookman has an EASY transfer decision
arts.sum: Ademola Lookman has been linked with a move to the Premier League - and data shows that there is an easy choice to make. The Italian outlet also say Atalanta will grant Lookman’s wishes to move to a bigger club at the end of the season.
